stemHtml: Assuming constant IAS, when an aeroplane leaves ground effect it experiences...

options.a: Increased downwash, induced angle of attack increases and induced drag increases.
options.b: Decreased downwash, induced angle of attack increases and induced drag increases.
options.c: Decreased downwash, induced angle of attack decreases and induced drag decreases.
options.d: Increased downwash, induced angle of attack decreases and induced drag decreases.
